title: MTR Low Effort British Rail Class 156 & 152
description: Low Effort British Rail Class 156 & 152 for MTR mod!
body:
# Low Effort British Rail Class 156 & 152
This pack features remodified versions of [Navi's (LX9702)](https://modrinth.com/user/LX9702) British Rail Class 507 & 508.
![Class 156](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ab33178a129437f6155f2b604fbf606a48b2f849.webp)
## Liveries
### Class 156:
- Merseyrail
- Northern
- Greater Anglia
- Blank
### Class 152:
- Merseyrail
- Blank
## Features
- The trains
- New original motor sounds
- Customised interior seats
